# MWSD And Project Sync Scope

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/providerintegrationgatedocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to integration gates](../integration-gates.md)

`mwsdbridge` and `project` are local projection adapters, not provider runtime execution owners.

- `mwsdbridge` is the anti-corruption layer for the macmini-workspace daemon socket contract.
- `project` builds the Riido workspace projection and syncs projected tasks into the public task DB shape.
- Project sync feeds task rows and diagnostics; it does not own provider sessions, SaaS transport, or runtime scheduling.
